programs.title: Peter Rabbit
programs.sub_title: The Tale of the Lost Journal
programs.desc: When Benjamin accidentally loses Peter's dad's journal, it falls into the clutches of Mr Tod.

programs.title: PJ Masks
programs.desc: Catboy wants to prove himself a brave Cat Explorer and realises that a true Cat Explorer puts his team before the discovery.

programs.title: Mojo Swoptops
programs.desc: Bryan the ferry can’t stop unless Mojo and Bo figure out how to get aboard and help him!

programs.title: Vida the Vet
programs.desc: When the entire Mouse family is absolutely exhausted, Vida realizes it's because Baby Mouse is teething ... and crying all night! Luckily, she knows how to soothe Baby Mouse so her family can get the rest they need.

programs.title: Flower & Flour
programs.desc: While Flower, Penny, and Dirk head out for the day, Flour the cat sneaks off on his own mischievous adventure around the plaza.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: Madame Gazelle and her playgroup kids discuss about the weather. Peppa's favourite weather is rain, Mandy's favourite is sun and Penny's favourite is snow.
